mapper.sql: select id, user_id, name, imei, type, create_time from qkyd_device_info
mapper.select: select id, user_id, name, imei, type, create_time from qkyd_device_info where imei = #{imei}

SELECT id as deviceId, user_id, name, imei, type, create_time FROM qkyd_device_info
user_id IS NULL and qkyd_device_info.imei like concat('%', #{imei}, '%')

SELECT sys_user.user_id as userId, qkyd_device_info.id AS deviceId, sys_user.nick_name as nickName, sys_user.phonenumber as phone, qkyd_device_info.imei as imei, qkyd_device_info.name as deviceName, qkyd_device_info.type as type, qkyd_device_info_extend.battery_level as batteryLevel, qkyd_device_info_extend.last_communication_time as readTime, qkyd_device_info.create_time as createTime FROM sys_user LEFT JOIN qkyd_device_info ON sys_user.user_id = qkyd_device_info.user_id LEFT JOIN qkyd_device_info_extend ON qkyd_device_info.id = qkyd_device_info_extend.device_id
and sys_user.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
insert into qkyd_device_info
user_id, name, imei, type, create_time,
#{userId}, #{name}, #{imei}, #{type}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from qkyd_device_info where id in
#{id}
